question: [EEB01] Evidence/Ticket to support performance of the Q1 2026 quarterly backup/restoration test. Please also provide supporting remediation evidence if applicable.

[EGM01/ESD01] Population of code changes and infrastructure changes from 01/01/2026 to current date including GitHub pull requests and env0 deployment runs. After population is received a sample will be selected and additional documentation requested.
Provide evidence of the existence of staging environments for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Include env0 environment inventory showing staging/production separation.

[EJS01] Policy and Procedures related to the job scheduling process including: (1) creation and modification process for job schedules, (2) required approvals before production jobs are submitted, (3) automated tools used to ensure jobs execute as scheduled.
[EJS01] Population of scheduled jobs for the period 01/01/2026 to current date. After population is received a sample will be selected and additional documentation requested.
[ESA01] Provide Q1 2026 Privileged and non-privileged Access Reviews for all in-scope systems.

[ESA03] Current account listing and role settings (Segregation of Duties / Role Based Matrices) for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Include user, generic, and system accounts. After population is received a sample will be selected to support least privilege and separation of duties.
[ESA03] Listing of users with database read-only access (all in-scope databases).
[ESA03] List of users with ability to make changes to the Production Environment for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Include env0 team and project role assignments for production environments.

[ESA03] List of users with the ability to deploy builds to Production for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Include env0 teams with deploy permissions to production projects and GitHub teams with merge/deploy access.
[ESA03] Listing of users with access to the test/staging environment for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake.
[ESA04] Evidence and tickets to support access changes for the Transfer Samples. If no access change was required provide a summary explanation as to why.
[ESA04] Sample evidence to support access changes based on Transfer Samples review results.

[ESA04] Population of access modifications for the period 01/01/2025 to current date for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Include env0 audit log for team membership and role changes. After population is received a sample will be selected.
[ESA04] Policy and Procedures supporting the disabling of accounts due to inactivity including the inactivity threshold and automated or manual enforcement process.
[EIT01] See auditor for specific request details — item description not provided in request list.

[ENS01] Audit logs for the following events on every Monday and Friday from 01/01/2026 through 04/01/2026 for: App-A, GitHub, RDS, Snowflake. Required events: (1) each time a user changes or attempts to change their password including successful and unsuccessful attempts, (2) newly created or removed accounts.
[ENS05] Confirm whether OS patching for servers is also handled automatically through Kandji/MDM as it is for workstations. Confirm whether updates are reviewed and approved before installation.
[ENS06] Provide a list of users who are alerted when an unauthorized network connection is detected.
